seoTitle: How to Speed Up Audio in Canva Easily
metaDescription: Learn how to speed up audio in Canva to tighten pacing on videos, presentations, and social clips without leaving the editor.
intro: Speeding up an audio clip in Canva helps you match narration or music to your video's pacing, which is especially useful for promotional clips, social content, and instructional videos. Rather than editing audio in separate software, you can adjust the speed right inside your Canva project. Here's how the process works.

steps.heading: Add your audio clip to the timeline
steps.body: Upload or select the audio track and drag it onto your design's timeline.

steps.heading: Select the audio clip
steps.body: Click on the clip in the timeline to bring up its editing options.

steps.heading: Find the speed setting
steps.body: Look for a speed or playback rate control in the audio toolbar and adjust it to speed up or slow down the clip.

steps.heading: Preview the change
steps.body: Play back your project to check that the sped-up audio still lines up with your visuals.

steps.heading: Trim and export
steps.body: Trim the clip if needed to match your video length, then export your finished project.

faq.question: Will speeding up audio in Canva change the pitch?
faq.answer: It can raise the pitch slightly at higher speeds, similar to fast-forwarding a recording, so it's worth previewing before finalizing.

faq.question: Can I speed up only part of an audio clip?
faq.answer: You can split the clip first, then apply the speed change to just the section you want adjusted.

faq.question: Is audio speed editing available on the free plan?
faq.answer: Yes, basic audio speed controls are available to free Canva users on video projects.

faq.question: Can I slow audio down the same way?
faq.answer: Yes, the same speed control lets you decrease as well as increase playback speed.
